conflicts: Community comment (June 26) states current price ~210 and demand box ~140–160, but actual current price is 438.57 — numbers do not align with current chart or data, making the source's conviction untrustworthy.
Zero's historical entry zone (395–410, May 2025) is already behind current price; the setup window has closed.
Community references a resistance at 297, which is below current price (438.57) and below the old TP1 (512), suggesting either a different chart or stale data.
plain_english: Zero called a bullish setup over a year ago with entry around 395–410 and targets toward 512. Price is now at 438.57, already past that entry zone. A community member posted on June 26 that TAO looks good if it aligns with USDT or BTC, but the price levels they mentioned (current ~210, demand ~140–160) don't match today's price or chart, raising doubt about their credibility. Wait for either a fresh, credible source with current structure, or a retest of a key support level (around 350–280) to re-anchor the setup.
